mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS id, s.city_id AS cityId, s.category_id AS categoryId, sc.name AS categoryName, s.name AS name, s.subtitle AS subtitle, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.cover_url AS cover, s.rating AS rating, s.rating_count AS ratingCount, s.comment_count AS reviewCount, '来自趣途' as review_source, s.description AS description, c.name AS locationTitle, s.address AS address, s.address AS locationDetail, s.price_min AS priceMin, s.price_max AS priceMax, s.price_text AS priceText, s.price_text AS price, CONCAT('最低¥', s.price_min) AS priceNote, s.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, s.view_count AS viewCount, c.name AS cityName, s.best_season AS bestSeason, s.suitable_for AS suitableFor, s.visit_duration_minutes AS visitDurationMinutes, s.status AS status, s.lng AS lng, s.lat AS lat FROM t_spot s LEFT JOIN t_destination_city c ON s.city_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_spot_category sc ON s.category_id = sc.id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.deleted_flag = 0

SELECT s.id, s.name, s.subtitle, s.cover_url, s.rating, s.rating_count, s.price_text, s.address, s.favorite_count, s.comment_count, c.name as city_name, ROUND( ST_Distance_Sphere( ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', #{lng}, ' ', #{lat}, ')'), 4326), ST_GeomFromText(CONCAT('POINT(', s.lng, ' ', s.lat, ')'), 4326) ) / 1000, 2 ) as distance FROM t_spot s LEFT JOIN t_destination_city c ON s.city_id = c.id WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.deleted_flag = 0 HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT g.id, g.title, g.cover_url AS cover, g.summary, CONCAT(g.days, '天', g.nights, '晚') AS duration_text, g.like_count, g.view_count, g.tag FROM t_guide g INNER JOIN t_guide_spot_map m ON g.id = m.guide_id WHERE m.spot_id = #{spotId} AND g.deleted_flag = 0 ORDER BY g.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
